message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

title HTTP Request and Response Flow

participant "Platform" as Platform1
    participant "CPO1" as CPO1
participant "HUB" as HUB
participant "Platform" as Platform2
    participant "MSP1" as MSP1

activate CPO1
activate HUB
activate MSP1

CPO1 -> HUB: HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1\nFROM: CPO1
HUB -> MSP1: HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1\nFROM: CPO1
MSP1 --> HUB: HTTP: RESPONSE\nTO: CPO1\nFROM: MSP1
HUB --> CPO1: HTTP: RESPONSE\nTO: CPO1\nFROM: MSP1

deactivate MSP1
deactivate HUB
deactivate CPO1

@enduml
```
